Eduardo Peralta

About me Get in touch

About me

Structure, clarity, and impact.

I'm a software developer with 9 years of experience, collaborating with engineering teams both as an individual contributor and as a technology lead.

My main strength is bringing structure and clarity to projects — organizing tasks according to business priorities so teams can move fast without losing sight of what matters.

I have strong expertise in backend development, API integrations, databases, and automation. Lately I've been incorporating AI and code agents into my workflow to build higher-quality software even faster.

I'm actively seeking new challenges where I can put this experience to the test and keep growing.
